jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Vistara
jsonLd.description:
Vistara is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vistara:
Vistara is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vistara!
